rationale: Clear, vivid, and well-organized essay that answers the prompt directly. Strong concrete details—the safety meeting, break, benefits talk, and quitting time—show how the union job changed the writer’s idea of work. Voice feels personal and human. Language is slightly literary at times, so not maximally plain, and a few reflective lines could be trimmed, but overall it is highly effective nonfiction.
